$comment: Shared, tracked project settings for claude-kit. Local-only overrides go in settings.local.json. autoMemoryDirectory points the harness auto-memory at the git-tracked repo memory/ lane so memory commits and syncs across machines/surfaces (PLAN.md Part 5; see memory/README.md); the same value is set at USER scope in ~/.claude/settings.json so the lane is active everywhere — plugins can't set this key (Final-verification #4, handoff 023). Hooks (PLAN.md Part 7.2; scripts in plugins/core/hooks/, canonical procedures in memory/README.md): ONLY SessionEnd 'session-end-backup.sh' is project-scoped (= backup-archive.sh to the OneDrive vault + an unpushed/uncommitted reminder, PLAN 5.4) — it mirrors schnapp-os's own knowledge base and must not fire from unrelated repos (decision 0005). The SessionStart freshness/git gate (PLAN 5.3) and the Stop push-gate are delivered GLOBALLY by the claude-kit-core plugin (via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}); they used to be wired here as dogfood and were removed at Part 10.1 install to avoid double-fire (handoff 026). Project hooks/settings honored after the per-machine workspace-trust dialog; hooks load at session start (restart to pick up changes). A machine cloning the repo elsewhere overrides paths/CLAUDE_KIT_REPO in settings.local.json.
